diagrams.title: Greedy Colouring Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step colouring of a sample graph showing how vertices get colours based on neighbour colours
diagrams.purpose: Understand the greedy colouring step-by-step process

diagrams.title: DSATUR Saturation Degrees
diagrams.description: Visual representation of saturation degree calculation for vertices in a graph
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how saturation degree is computed and used in vertex selection

diagrams.title: Effect of Vertex Ordering
diagrams.description: Comparison of different vertex orderings on the same graph showing different colour counts
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate how vertex ordering impacts greedy colouring quality

diagrams.title: Welsh-Powell Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the steps of Welsh-Powell greedy colouring algorithm
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete Welsh-Powell algorithm procedure
